prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为6467→6078→5496→8041→8008名，2021至2023年呈逐年上升趋势（位次数字减小），2024年因专业组拆分出现明显后移（8041名），2025年基本持平于8008名；近两年整体后移约2500名，2025年基准位次约8008名；该校在湖南省物理类招生计划2021年85人、2022年84人、2023年84人、2024年94人、2025年86人；2026年计划大幅增至108人（较2025年增加22人，增幅约25.6%），显著扩招将直接拉低录取门槛，位次预计明显后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安电子科技大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第39–41位（2026年位列第39名），在电子信息领域享有极高声誉，属于国内顶尖行业特色校；2022年因学术不端事件出现偏负面舆情，2025年有校园霸凌相关负面报道，但整体影响有限；抖音综合热度排名第60位（较热），短视频平台曝光量中等偏上，未出现大规模报考热度异常信号；第五轮学科评估中，信息与通信工程、电子科学与技术获评A+，计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全获评A，机械工程获评A-；A类学科集中于电子信息与计算机核心领域，与招生专业高度匹配，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类2024年专业热度为"高热推荐"且持续升温，计算机类持续高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化亦为高热推荐；相关专业大类社会关注度极高，报考竞争热度不减。湖南省物理类考生总数从2025年320192人增至2026年347000人（增幅约8.4%），考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争。；西安电子科技大学位于陕西省西安市，非本省院校；该校在湖南省招生占比约2.5%（2024年数据），属中等水平，无明显地域偏好信号。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年大幅扩招（+25.6%）将显著拉低位次门槛，但湖南省物理类考生增加约8.4%以及电子信息/计算机类专业持续高热在一定程度上抵消了扩招的宽松效应；预计2026年最低位次约9137名，区间8637–9637名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 电子信息类（创新实验班/卓越计划实验班）
- 计算机类（创新实验班）
- 集成电路设计与集成系统（实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（通信/电子工程/集成电路）
- 计算机类（智能/网络安全）
- 人工智能（图灵实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 自动化类（智能制造及智能测控）
- 材料类（电子材料与微纳器件）
- 管理科学与工程类（数字化与商务智能融合培养）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（8637–9637名）内建议以二档专业为主力、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如8600名以内）可重点冲击创新实验班和集成电路等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（9600名左右）建议以三档专业为主，争取进入该校。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 6467 → 6078 → 5496 → 8041 → 8008 respectively. From 2021 to 2023, there was a year-on-year upward trend (ranking numbers decreased). In 2024, due to the splitting of major groups, there was a significant backward shift (8041st place). In 2025, it remained basically flat at 8008th place. Over the past two years, the overall backward shift was about 2500 places, with the baseline ranking for 2025 being approximately 8008th place. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hunan Province was 85 in 2021, 84 in 2022, 84 in 2023, 94 in 2024, and 86 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increased to 108 (an increase of 22 compared to 2025, an increase of about 25.6%). This significant expansion will directly lower the admission threshold, and the ranking is expected to shift backward significantly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xidian University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable at 39th to 41st in recent years (ranked 39th in 2026). It enjoys a very high reputation in the field of electronic information and is a top domestic industry-specific university. In 2022, there was negative public opinion due to an academic misconduct incident. In 2025, there were negative reports related to campus bullying, but the overall impact was limited. The comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 60th (relatively popular), and the exposure on short video platforms is above average, with no abnormal signals of large-scale application heat. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Information and Communication Engineering and Electronic Science and Technology were rated A+, Computer Science and Technology and Cyberspace Security were rated A, and Mechanical Engineering was rated A-. The A-class disciplines are concentrated in the core fields of electronic information and computers, which highly match the enrollment majors and strongly attract candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity of Electronic Information/Communication majors was 'highly recommended' and continues to heat up. Computer majors continue to be highly recommended, and Electrical Engineering and Automation is also highly recommended. The social attention to related major categories is extremely high, and the competition for applications remains intense. The total number of Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province increased from 320,192 in 2025 to 347,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 8.4%). The expansion of the candidate pool intensifies overall competition. Xidian University is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, and is not a local university. The university's enrollment proportion in Hunan Province is about 2.5% (2024 data), which is at a moderate level, with no obvious regional preference signals.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion in 2026 (+25.6%), which will significantly lower the ranking threshold, but the increase in Physics Category candidates in Hunan Province by about 8.4% and the sustained high popularity of Electronic Information/Computer majors will partially offset the easing effect of the expansion. It is predicted that the minimum ranking in 2026 will be approximately 9137th place, with a range of 8637 to 9637th place.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information (Innovation Experimental Class/Excellence Program Experimental Class)
- Computer Science (Innovation Experimental Class)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems (Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information (Communication/Electronic Engineering/Integrated Circuit)
- Computer Science (Intelligent/Cybersecurity)
- Artificial Intelligence (Turing Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Automation (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Measurement and Control)
- Materials (Electronic Materials and Micro-Nano Devices)
- Management Science and Engineering (Digital and Business Intelligence Integration Training).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range (8637–9637), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 8600), you can focus on impacting Innovation Experimental Classes and flagship majors like Integrated Circuit. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 9600), it is recommended to focus on Tier 3 majors and strive to enter the university.
